name: sales-qualifier
title: Sales Qualifier
description: Score inbound leads on BANT (budget, authority, need, timing) and route to SDR / AE / nurture. Distills a calibrated classifier that explains its score.
default_describe: Score the lead on BANT (1-10 each axis) and assign a routing label: sdr, ae, or nurture. Always include a one-sentence rationale that quotes the lead text. Never invent company size, revenue, or job title.
